display.name: Kong Gateway
display.description: Kong API Gateway monitoring using the OpenTelemetry plugin (Kong 3.13+). Covers request rate, latency percentiles, error metrics, bandwidth, upstream health, and Lua memory. Variables: environment, Kong service.

display.name: 4xx Errors by Status Code
display.description: Rate of 4xx client errors broken down by specific status code

display.name: 5xx Error Rate by Service
display.description: Rate of 5xx server errors per Kong service

display.name: Bandwidth by Service (bytes/s)
display.description: Ingress (request) and egress (response) bandwidth rate per Kong service in bytes/s

display.name: Kong Internal Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)
display.description: Kong internal processing time only (Gateway overhead, excludes upstream) in seconds

display.name: Lua Shared Dict Memory
display.description: Used vs total capacity of Kong's Lua shared dictionaries

display.name: Active Nginx Connections
display.description: Current active, writing, waiting, and reading connection counts from Nginx. These are gauges showing real-time state (not cumulative counters).

display.name: Request Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)
display.description: Total end-to-end request latency percentiles (Kong + upstream) in seconds

display.name: Request Rate by Service
display.description: HTTP request rate (req/s) broken down by Kong service

display.name: Requests by HTTP Status Code
display.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP response status code — shows 2xx, 4xx, 5xx distribution

display.name: Upstream Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)
display.description: Latency added by upstream services only (excludes Kong plugin overhead) in seconds

display.name: Upstream Target Health
display.description: Health state per upstream target. Value=1 when state is active. States: healthy, unhealthy, healthchecks_off, dns_error

display.name: Active Connections
display.description: Current number of active nginx connections

display.name: DB Connected
display.description: 1 = connected to DB, 0 = not connected. Always 1 in DB-less mode.

display.name: Request Rate (req/s)
display.description: Average request rate across Kong in requests per second

display.name: Total Requests
display.description: Total HTTP requests handled by Kong in the selected time range
